creator: dan.kotowski@a9development.com
text:
(In reply to Mikael Urankar from comment #1)

Interesting, it isn't fetched? Even if I run with bulk -C, it never makes it in?

$ grep -i DISTFILES_CACHE /usr/local/etc/poudriere.conf
DISTFILES_CACHE=/usr/ports/distfiles

$ ls -l -t /usr/ports/distfiles/libsignal-node-*
-rw-r--r--  1 root wheel 24863552 Jun  7 11:36 /usr/ports/distfiles/libsignal-node-0.46.2-yarn-cache.tar.gz
-rw-r--r--  1 root wheel 24863552 May  5 19:17 /usr/ports/distfiles/libsignal-node-0.45.0-yarn-cache.tar.gz
-rw-r--r--  1 root wheel 24471564 Mar 20 02:24 /usr/ports/distfiles/libsignal-node-0.39.1-yarn-cache.tar.gz
-rw-r--r--  1 root wheel 24342584 Jan 12  2024 /usr/ports/distfiles/libsignal-node-0.36.0-yarn-cache.tar.gz
-rw-r--r--  1 root wheel 23540764 Dec  5  2023 /usr/ports/distfiles/libsignal-node-0.32.1-yarn-cache.tar.gz
-rw-r--r--  1 root wheel 23540764 Oct 20  2023 /usr/ports/distfiles/libsignal-node-0.31.0-yarn-cache.tar.gz
-rw-r--r--  1 root wheel 23540764 Sep  8  2023 /usr/ports/distfiles/libsignal-node-0.30.2-yarn-cache.tar.gz
-rw-r--r--  1 root wheel 23540764 Aug 24  2023 /usr/ports/distfiles/libsignal-node-0.29.1-yarn-cache.tar.gz
-rw-r--r--  1 root wheel 22963764 Feb 28  2023 /usr/ports/distfiles/libsignal-node-0.22.0-yarn-cache.tar.gz
